title: The Count
author: Scott Adams
objective: Escape from Castle Dracula and destroy the vampire Count.
key_mechanics: Day/night cycle: The game alternates between day and night. Dracula is active at night and will bite you if you're unprotected. The pocket watch tracks time.
COUGHIN/COFFIN pun: Smoking a cigarette in the crypt produces 'a COUGHIN in the room' - a pun that makes Dracula's coffin appear. This is the central puzzle.
Sheet climbing: TIE SHEETS to the flag pole on the ledge, then CLIMB DOWN to reach the dark window and access the doorless room.
Dark window: A hidden window below the bedroom ledge, visible from outside the castle (LOOK UP) or revealed when you jump (fatally). Leads to the doorless room.
Garlic protection: The pillow contains garlic cloves. Wearing garlic (as a necklace with daisies) protects you from Dracula at night.
Dracula's portrait: In the doorless room, moving/looking behind the portrait reveals a secret passage to the dark passage and crypt.
Dumb-waiter elevator: Connects three floors - kitchen (room 12), workroom (room 21), and pantry (room 14). RAISE (OPEN DUM) to go up, LOWER (PUT DUM) to go down. Exceeding limits can be fatal.
Staking the vampire: Use the rubber mallet from the workroom to hammer a stake into Dracula while he's in his coffin during the day.
Cigarette lighting: Get cigarettes from the parlor (room 13), light them with sulfur matches from the pantry (room 14).
Iron rings and pit: TIE SHEETS to the iron rings in the dungeon (room 16) to climb down to the pit (room 18) where the unlit torch is.
Torch lighting: Get the unlit torch from the pit, light it with sulfur matches for exploring dark areas.
Mirror usage: Vampires cast no reflection - the mirror can be used to detect Dracula's presence.
Locked door: The workroom has a locked door. Find the key to access additional areas.
Ventilation system: Vents appear in several rooms and may connect areas of the castle.

walkthrough.result: Pick up the bed sheets (essential for climbing later).
Pick up the pillow (contains hidden garlic cloves).
Stand up and move to the bedroom (room 2).
Open the bedroom window to access the ledge outside.
Go north to the hall (room 11).
Go north to the bathroom (room 8).
Pick up the pocket watch to track the day/night cycle.
Pick up the mirror (useful for detecting vampires).
Return south to the hall (room 11).
Go east to outside the castle (room 9).
Notice a dark window under the bedroom window ledge (important clue).
Return west to the hall (room 11).
Go west to the kitchen (room 12).
Pick up garlic (or OPEN PILLOW first if garlic is inside the pillow).
Enter the dumb-waiter (room 20).
Lower the dumb-waiter one floor down.
Exit to the pantry (room 14).
Pick up the sulfur matches (for lighting torch and cigarettes).
Return to the dumb-waiter (room 20).
Raise the dumb-waiter one floor up.
Raise the dumb-waiter another floor to the workroom level.
Exit to the workroom (room 21).
Pick up the rubber mallet (essential for hammering the stake into Dracula).
Read the memo tacked to the door for important clues.
Go east to the closet (room 7).
Pick up the small vial (may contain holy water).
Return west to the workroom (room 21).
Go down to the dungeon (room 16).
Tie the sheets to the iron rings in the dungeon.
Climb down the sheets to the pit (room 18).
Pick up the unlit torch (essential light source).
Climb back up the sheets to the dungeon (room 16).
Light the torch with sulfur matches. Now you have a light source for dark areas.
Go up to the workroom (room 21).
Drop unneeded items to free inventory space.
Enter the dumb-waiter from the workroom (room 20).
Raise to kitchen level.
Exit to the kitchen (room 12).
Go east to the hall (room 11).
Go east to outside the castle (room 9).
Go east to the graveyard (room 17).
Pick up the wooden stake from the graveyard (or LOOK GRAVES to find it).
Return west to outside the castle (room 9).
Return west to the hall (room 11).
Go west to the kitchen (room 12).
Go south to the parlor (room 13).
Pick up the cigarettes (needed for the COUGHIN/COFFIN puzzle).
Light a cigarette with the matches.
Return north to the kitchen (room 12).
Go east to the hall (room 11).
Go south to the bedroom (room 2).
Go through the open window to the ledge (room 3).
Tie the sheets to the flag pole (if not already done).
Climb down the sheets to the hanging position (room 4).
Enter the flower box (room 5).
Enter the doorless room through the dark window (room 10).
Move Dracula's portrait to reveal the hidden passage.
Go south through the passage to the dark passage (room 19).
Go north to the crypt (room 6).
Smoke the lit cigarette in the crypt. 'There's a COUGHIN in the room!' - the COFFIN appears!
Open Dracula's coffin to reveal the vampire sleeping inside (must be daytime).
Place the wooden stake on Dracula's chest.
Hammer the stake with the rubber mallet. Dracula is destroyed! You win!

common_mistakes: Jumping from the ledge (room 3) - This is instantly fatal. You'll see the dark window clue as you fall but it's too late. Use LOOK UP from outside instead.
Forgetting to GET SHEETS before GET UP - The sheets are essential for climbing down to the dark window. You can't get them after leaving the bed room easily.
Not opening the window before going to the ledge - You must OPEN WINDOW in the bedroom (room 2) before you can GO WINDOW to the ledge.
Being caught by Dracula at night without garlic - At nightfall, Dracula becomes active. Without garlic protection, he'll bite you and it's game over (room 22).
Wasting time and letting night fall - The day/night cycle is time-limited. If you take too many moves during the day, night falls and Dracula becomes dangerous.
Not getting the pillow - The pillow contains garlic cloves needed for vampire protection. OPEN PILLOW to get the garlic.
Raising or lowering the dumb-waiter past its limits - Going too high or too low in the dumb-waiter is fatal. Track which floor you're on.
Trying to smoke in the crypt without a lit cigarette - You need to GET CIGARETTES from the parlor (room 13) and LIGHT them with matches before going to the crypt.
Missing the portrait puzzle - The doorless room has no regular exits. You must MOVE PORTRAIT or LOOK PORTRAIT to find the hidden passage to the crypt.
Not getting the mallet - The rubber mallet from the workroom (room 21) is essential for hammering the stake into Dracula. The stake alone won't work.
Forgetting matches from the pantry - Sulfur matches (room 14) are needed to light both the torch and cigarettes. Get them early.
Not tying sheets to the flag pole - You must TIE SHEETS to the flag pole on the ledge before you can CLIMB DOWN. Without tying them, you'll fall.
